title: I Tried Confessing
overview: A subordinate of the Demon King falls in love with a priestess in the hero's party.

title: I Tried Going on a Date
overview: Celia asks Yoki to take Cecilia out on a date as a break from her daily stresses and obligations.

title: I Tried Giving Love Advice
overview: While Yoki is helping Raven win over his crush, they run into another old friend in need of love advice.

title: I Gave the Hero a Lecture
overview: After Raven and Mikana, Yuga is next to seek advice from Yoki.

title: I Tried Being a Demon Again
overview: While helping a village that's been attacked by bandits, Yoki and Cecilia encounter a new threat.

title: I Tried Flying
overview: Teal takes a turn for the worse, and at the same time, Gar is in peril. Can Yoki save both of them in time?

title: I Tried Receiving Chocolates
overview: Valentine's Day is for giving chocolate to someone special, but not everyone agrees.

title: I Tried Saving a Mermaid
overview: Yoki accepts a quest to stop a string of thefts on merchant ships in a port town.

title: I Tried Learning More About the Girl I Love
overview: Yoki realizes he doesn't know much about Cecilia, so he tries going on a quest with her to learn more.

title: I Tried Hearing Out the Guardian Deity's Troubles
overview: Gar decides to work and make money on his own to repay his debt to Teal.

title: I Tried Watching Over My Friend and My Former Subordinate
overview: Raven starts to feel like his own weakness and powerlessness are hurting his chances with Happiness.

title: I Tried Listening to My Crush's Arranged Marriage Plan
overview: Cecilia is meeting the man that the king wants her to marry. How will Yoki take the news?

title: I Tried Being in a... with My Crush
overview: A mysterious figure who looks just like Yoki's alter-ego is causing chaos in the capital.
